subject: Add gremlin and ES services
commit_message:
Add gremlin and ES services

Issue-ID: OOM-65
Change-Id: I3e879418a1258716db1633676cf66bb9620c2b5f
Signed-off-by: yuryn <Yury.Novitsky@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi Yury,

I believe this is not require as the entrypoint.sh is baked in docker image. The following comes from docker inspect.

            "WorkingDir": "/opt",
            "Entrypoint": [
                "/bin/bash",
                "/opt/entrypoint.sh"
            ]

Patch Set 1:

> Hi Yury,
 > 
 > I believe this is not require as the entrypoint.sh is baked in
 > docker image. The following comes from docker inspect.
 > 
 > "WorkingDir": "/opt",
 > "Entrypoint": [
 > "/bin/bash",
 > "/opt/entrypoint.sh"
 > ]

Hi Munir,
The entrypoint.sh does not create the content of the /opt/data/hdfs-data-name folder and the hbase fails to start.

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

> > Hi Yury,
 > >
 > > I believe this is not require as the entrypoint.sh is baked in
 > > docker image. The following comes from docker inspect.
 > >
 > > "WorkingDir": "/opt",
 > > "Entrypoint": [
 > > "/bin/bash",
 > > "/opt/entrypoint.sh"
 > > ]
 > 
 > Hi Munir,
 > The entrypoint.sh does not create the content of the
 > /opt/data/hdfs-data-name folder and the hbase fails to start.

This was test and working in our env. is it a permission issue where directory is mounted?

Patch Set 1:

> > > Hi Yury,
 > > >
 > > > I believe this is not require as the entrypoint.sh is baked in
 > > > docker image. The following comes from docker inspect.
 > > >
 > > > "WorkingDir": "/opt",
 > > > "Entrypoint": [
 > > > "/bin/bash",
 > > > "/opt/entrypoint.sh"
 > > > ]
 > >
 > > Hi Munir,
 > > The entrypoint.sh does not create the content of the
 > > /opt/data/hdfs-data-name folder and the hbase fails to start.
 > 
 > This was test and working in our env. is it a permission issue
 > where directory is mounted?

No, it is not permission issue as all the processes run as root. In the test it probably works because the test does not mount this folder externally and the folder is already in the image.
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda
